case_title: PAUL AESCHBACHER VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MALPRACTICE - MEDICAL/DENTAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AESCHBACHER, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA COFFEY, SUSA DOES 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-26-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-11-2003

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST PAUL AESCHBACHER, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-18-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-03-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: GENA EALES, CSR	176. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST PAUL AESCHBACHER, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-09-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-24-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RON SINCLAIR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-12-2004 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Continued To Apr-12-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/12/2004 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2003 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-09-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
